transcript.text:
Subscribe, Like
Notifications
Please
[24 packs of noodles] They said she can eat all of this
Is it true?
Do you really eat this by yourself?
[Watching her videos]
[240 piece sushi mukbang]
This is without the dessert mukbang
[What!?]
Hello everyone~
I am here to meet Zico
I'm a fan of his
And he said he will cook for me
So I'm very excited
Hello

[Food Gangster X Soundtrack Gangster]
[Awkward]
[What?]
Fighting!
Please make yourself at home
[Well in that case]
I'll use the restroom
Go ahead
[I'll play by myself]
[Hobby: Photography] [Posing: Specialty]
Can I do something like this?
[Comes back]
I feel like I stepped inside her YouTube video
These YouTube stars are different from us celebrities
I saw you do the One Chip Challenge
I saw your eyes flip

Why that video!?
I really like K-rappers
And I like you out of them
Out of them? So out of like 5?
No no no no
Did you subscribe to Tzuyang?
Huh?
I'm here to make my life dish
It will be one of my best dishes
[Zico chooses what to make] Pancake powder?
[Honest] The Program Director told me to make some kimchi pancake
So I'm probably going to make that
Why are there so many noodles?
[Zico's big picture] Just in case you're still hungry after
Shall we put on sanitary gloves?
[Awkward]

Egg first
[Back and forth]
What is this?
[The gas lever is not down]
I'm curious
if you have ever been full
Are you always full after a meal?
Not always
Sometimes?
I don't have a big stomach
You don't have a big stomach?
I just have a fast metabolism
How many are you cooking?
8 servings
Is that too small?
No no no

[Oops]
I thought I was going to be the one that can't break the ice
I'm really awkward at first
What is your best dish?
I'm pretty good at making fried food
Oh really?
Then how about this?
Oh, this isn't used to fry food
[Idiot ♥]
Is the camera going to be okay in the refrigerator?
Tomato? Lemon?
[Any Food Challenge]
Is there ice cream?
[Thankfully choice the right ingredients]
[Just mix it up]
Egg

[Boiled egg]
I'm getting nervous because of the camera insert
You're a top celebrity scared of a small camera?
[I'm still shy]
[Out of focus, No insert]
What was the best dish you've ever had?
I've been wanting to know
That's a hard question
I like that 1 Spicy Rice Cake place
Well, that's not good
[Because he's making Spicy Rice Cake]
[Tzuyang's Any Food: Kimchi Pancake(?)]
I heard that chopping sound from the Fisheries Market
Do I need to season the powder?
[How about the Spicy Rice Cake?]
Okay, wait

Looking for things to add
This is an easy fix
Artificial flavoring is science
Is it down here?
Can I put some in here too?
Wouldn't the Ramyun powder make it delicious?
I didn't fail yet No, I meant on mine
[She keeps searching the refrigerator]
[Kidnap]
Tomat.. What is the tomato for?
I'm going to eat it
Oh you're going to eat it
[Drops]
That is a sign that this food is going to be really delicious
Because when I'm recording in the studio,
Wait, it's overflowing

This was what the sign was for
[Kimchi Pancake]
[First flip attempt]
That's my first time
The food is ready
That looks like a moth
Or even a Spicy Rice Cake Monster
Run!
Hello everyone~ Today, I'm with Zico
To do mukbang together
Kim.. what was the name again? Spicy Rice Cake Monster
Right, this is the Spicy Rice Cake monster
Aren't we doing the thumbnail thing?
That's a good idea
[2.42m subscriber YouTuber and Genius Musician] [Spicy Rice Cake Monster Murder Scene]
Bon appetit

That's so cruel
I put up his meat
Take this
Put it here and eat it with the rice cake
I really like the name of this dish
The spicy rice cake is really tasty
Really? Yes
Hot!
Eat slowly
Hot!
Spicy Rice Cake is still hot
I have a question
What happens when you get really full when you're on live and people are watching you
I was like that for the sushi mukbang
I got full at like 230 pieces
Not even 30 pieces, but at 230...

Yes, at 230 pieces
I thought I couldn't eat anymore
But it was possible after like 5 minutes of digesting
Do something like Muk Me the Money (Parody of Show Me the Money)
With all the Mukbang YouTubers Just like Produce 101, but like Fooduce 101
Tzuyang will win it anyways
A lot of the famous rappers get eliminated in the beginning for Show Me the Money
So it can be like "Shocking news! Tzuyang is eliminated!"
I think I need to be with someone that is really shy for me to comfortably break the ice
You made me feel very comfortable I did?
So like..
Nevermind
But like..
What was it?
Nevermind
I don't have that much time these days

I know all the old songs
How do I ask this?
Do you have a song coming out soon?
[Zico asks Zico]
Do you have a song coming out?
I have a song coming out to blow the heat away this Summer
Really? Is it almost done?
About 60-70% done
Show us like a teaser
1 verse?
I can't
Why didn't you do the Any Song challenge when it was trending?
Because I can't dance
[Challenge Accepted]
Just walking like this
There's sushi in front of you

Walk towards it
Wait for me sushi
And you walk
And there's Spicy Rice Cake on your right
Oh hey, Spice Rice Cake!
[Eureka]
You just do that 2 times
[Right, Left]
[Which direction, again?]
I think I was like that when I was a white belt in Tae Kwon Do
Get that dust off your shoulders
Dust it off
And
Move like this
[What?]
Or...

Hey, there's an egg
Boiled egg!
Sushi, wait for me
Oh, Spicy Rice Cake!
Boiled egg!
So you enjoy listening to rap music?
Yes totally
I watched all of the Show Me the Money episodes
The seasons I came out in too? Of course
[Good job]
I know all the songs too
I have a younger brother
He just finished his time in service
He loves to rap
What's his name?
Tzuchul Tzuchul?

Tzu? Yes, Tzuchul
Really? Yes, really
Really?
Can he come in? Sure
Thank you Just a sec
[MC Tzuchul meets Zico]
He's dreaming to become a rapper
24 years old
Teenager
Hello
I'm a fan
[Amazing]
So..
You laugh a lot
I'm happy to see you, that's why
What do you want me to do for you?

I want to learn how to rap
Then let's do this
Do like 8 verses of your favorite rap song
8 verses?
Anything you're good at
Do I really do it?
Why?
I thought this was Tzuchul
Yes, it's Tzuchul
You're Tzuchul, right? Huh?
Yes, of course
Is that your style?
Like "check it"?
That wasn't bad at all
[Edited because it was embarrassing]
Golden necklace

Do I give you my necklace?
I've never seen anyone express their hesitation through their rap
When you were finishing it up
There was a moment of regret and every other feeling inside it
Are you.. Tzuyang?
Me? No, I'm Tzuchul Ah, okay
If I were the judge on the show
I would've eliminated you,
but I would tell the Program Director that this person is needed for the show (entertainment purposes)
I will leave the rest up to the subscribers
Give her the necklace of approval or no?
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
